message:
Running command: # Step 32 (tap/endcap insertion) - PnR progressing fast.
# After this: PDN -> IO placement -> global placement -> repair -> detailed placement -> routing -> GDS
# Full monitoring loop

WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_wrapper.log"
LR_PID=342178

for i in $(seq 1 360); do
  sleep 120
  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  STEP_COUNT=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[0-9]" || echo 0)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  OR_MEM=$(pgrep -a "openroad" 2>/dev/null | grep -v "bash\|grep" | head -1 | awk '{print $1}' | xargs -I{} ps -p {} -o pmem --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-80)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP (#${STEP_COUNT}) OR_mem=${OR_MEM}%"
  echo "  $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** FINAL GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -60
    echo ""
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort
    echo ""
    echo "=== Last 80 log lines ==="
    tail -80 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done
